languages.text: "Что?!" {n}С гемункула вмиг слетает мнимое благодушие. Тервантьяс в бешенстве простирает многочисленные конечности над головой Эоганна. Он шипит:{/n} "Следующий эксперимент станет для тебя последним, мон-кай".
"What?" {n}Tervantias's mask of civility shatters. Livid, he looms over Eogunn, his many limbs splayed wide and hisses,{/n} "The next experiment will be your very last, mon-keigh."
languages.original_text: "Что?!" {n}С гемункула вмиг слетает мнимое благодушие. Тервантьяс в бешенстве простирает многочисленные конечности над головой Эоганна. Он шипит:{/n} "Следующий эксперимент станет для тебя последним, мон-кай".

traits.locale_text: "What?" {n}Tervantias's mask of civility shatters. Livid, he looms over Eogunn, his many limbs splayed wide. He hisses:{/n} "The next experiment will be your very last, mon-keigh."

"What?" {n}Tervantias's mask of civility shatters. Livid, he looms over Eogunn, his many limbs splayed wide and hisses,{/n} "The next experiment will be your very last, mon-keigh."
"What?" {n}Tervantias's mask of civility shatters. Livid, he looms over Eogunn, his many limbs splayed wide and hisses,{/n} "The next experiment will be your very last, mon-keigh."

languages.text: "Was?" {n}Tervantias' zivilisierte Fassade fällt in sich zusammen. Er beugt sich mit ausgebreiteten Gliedmaßen wütend über Eogunn und zischt:{/n} "Das nächste Experiment wird Euer letztes sein, Chem-Pan-Sey."
languages.original_text: "What?" {n}Tervantias's mask of civility shatters. Livid, he looms over Eogunn, his many limbs splayed wide and hisses,{/n} "The next experiment will be your very last, mon-keigh."

traits.locale_text: "Was?" {n}Tervantias' zivilisierte Fassade fällt in sich zusammen. Er beugt sich mit ausgebreiteten Gliedmaßen wütend über Eogunn und zischt:{/n} "Das nächste Experiment wird Euer letztes sein, Chem-Pan-Sey."

languages.text: « Quoi ? » {n}Le masque policé de Tervantias disparaît en un instant. Livide, il toise Eogunn en écartant ses nombreux bras dans une posture menaçante et persifle :{/n} « Ma prochaine expérience sera la dernière pour vous, mon-keigh. »
languages.original_text: "What?" {n}Tervantias's mask of civility shatters. Livid, he looms over Eogunn, his many limbs splayed wide and hisses,{/n} "The next experiment will be your very last, mon-keigh."

traits.locale_text: « Quoi ? » {n}Le masque policé de Tervantias disparaît en un instant. Livide, il toise Eogunn en écartant ses nombreux bras dans une posture menaçante et persifle :{/n} « Ma prochaine expérience sera la dernière pour vous, mon-keigh. »

languages.text: «¡¿Cómo?!». {n}Todo asomo de civismo desaparece de Tervantias. Furioso, se yergue sobre Eogunn, extendiendo sus numerosas extremidades, y sisea:{/n} «Tu siguiente experimento será el último, mon-keigh».
languages.original_text: "What?" {n}Tervantias's mask of civility shatters. Livid, he looms over Eogunn, his many limbs splayed wide and hisses,{/n} "The next experiment will be your very last, mon-keigh."

traits.locale_text: «¡¿Cómo?!». {n}Todo asomo de civismo desaparece de Tervantias. Furioso, se yergue sobre Eogunn, extendiendo sus numerosas extremidades, y sisea:{/n} «Tu siguiente experimento será el último, mon-keigh».

languages.text: "Ne?" {n}Tervantias'ın nezaket maskesi paramparça oluyor. Öfkeden deliye dönmüş bir hâlde, birçok uzvu ardına kadar açılmış olarak Eogunn'un üzerinde dikilip tıslıyor.{/n} "Bir sonraki deney, son deneyin olacak mon-keigh."
languages.original_text: "What?" {n}Tervantias's mask of civility shatters. Livid, he looms over Eogunn, his many limbs splayed wide and hisses,{/n} "The next experiment will be your very last, mon-keigh."

traits.locale_text: "Ne?" {n}Tervantias'ın nezaket maskesi paramparça oluyor. Öfkeden deliye dönmüş bir hâlde, birçok uzvu ardına kadar açılmış olarak Eogunn'un üzerinde dikilip tıslıyor.{/n} "Bir sonraki deney, son deneyin olacak mon-keigh."

languages.text: “你说什么？”{n}特万提亚斯那彬彬有礼的伪装瞬间崩塌。他气得面色铁青，俯身逼向伊奥贡，众多肢体大张开来。他嘶声说道，{/n}“下一个实验就是你的死期，猴子。”
languages.original_text: "What?" {n}Tervantias's mask of civility shatters. Livid, he looms over Eogunn, his many limbs splayed wide and hisses,{/n} "The next experiment will be your very last, mon-keigh."

traits.locale_text: “你说什么？”{n}特万提亚斯那彬彬有礼的伪装瞬间崩塌。他气得面色铁青，俯身逼向伊奥贡，众多肢体大张开来。他嘶声说道，{/n}“下一个实验就是你的死期，猴子。”

languages.text: 「何だと？」{n}テルヴァンティアスの慇懃の仮面が砕け散る。激怒した彼は、何本もの肢を大きく広げてエオガンに覆いかぶさり、しゅうと声を漏らす。{/n}「次の実験が、貴様の正真正銘最後の実験となろう、モンケイ」
languages.original_text: "What?" {n}Tervantias's mask of civility shatters. Livid, he looms over Eogunn, his many limbs splayed wide and hisses,{/n} "The next experiment will be your very last, mon-keigh."

traits.locale_text: 「何だと？」{n}テルヴァンティアスの慇懃の仮面が砕け散る。激怒した彼は、何本もの肢を大きく広げてエオガンに覆いかぶさり、しゅうと声を漏らす。{/n}「次の実験が、貴様の正真正銘最後の実験となろう、モンケイ」
